child_health_threshold.description: Number of child health checks that must be healthy for the parent health check to be considered healthy; must be less than or equal to the number of child health checks.

child_healthchecks.description: List of health check IDs to associate as child health checks in a calculated health check. Must be valid Route 53 health check IDs.

cloudwatch_alarm_name.description: Specifies the name of the CloudWatch alarm to associate with the Route 53 health check; must match an existing CloudWatch alarm.

cloudwatch_alarm_region.description: Specifies the AWS region where the CloudWatch alarm associated with the health check is located.

disabled.description: Indicates whether the health check is disabled. Set to true to prevent Route 53 from performing health checks.

enable_sni.description: Determines whether to enable Server Name Indication (SNI) for HTTPS health checks; required for servers hosting multiple TLS/SSL certificates.

failure_threshold.description: Number of consecutive health check failures required before marking the endpoint as unhealthy. Must be between 1 and 10.

fqdn.description: Specifies the fully qualified domain name (FQDN) of the endpoint to check, required for HTTP or HTTPS health checks. Must be a valid domain name.

insufficient_data_health_status.description: Specifies the health check status to report when no sufficient data is available, such as "Healthy" or "Unhealthy".

invert_healthcheck.description: Specifies whether to invert the health check's status; set to true to consider the endpoint healthy when it is unhealthy and vice versa.

ip_address.description: IPv4 address of the endpoint to check for health; required if using TCP or HTTP/HTTPS protocols.

measure_latency.description: Indicates whether to measure latency between health checkers and the endpoint. Accepts true or false.

port.description: Specifies the port on which the endpoint is listening; valid values are 1 to 65535.

reference_name.description: Friendly identifier for the health check, used to easily identify it within the configuration.

regions.description: Specifies the AWS regions to route traffic for health check evaluation; must include valid region names.

request_interval.description: Defines the frequency (in seconds) at which Route 53 sends health check requests to the endpoint. Must be either 10 or 30 seconds.

resource_path.description: Specifies the HTTP or HTTPS path to check for a healthy response; required if the health check type is HTTP or HTTPS.

routing_control_arn.description: ARN of the routing control associated with the health check; required for routing control-based checks.

search_string.description: Specifies the string to search for in the response body from the health check endpoint; required for HTTP or HTTPS health checks with string matching enabled.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to organize and categorize the health check, supporting tagging for identification, filtering, and management.

triggers.description: Defines the events or metrics that initiate the health check evaluation, such as changes in resource state or specific conditions.

type.description: Specifies the type of health check to perform, such as HTTP, HTTPS, or TCP; must match one of the supported health check types.
